examples: The newly bought hawkthorn tree, which has produced little fruits, but not so many.
This research studied the effect of NaOH solution, H2O2 solution, hot water and ultrasonic wave on eliminating of sulfur dioxide remaining in the chip of hawkthorn.
This paper explored and built the best technology of a hawkthorn acetic acid drink with sugar-free and high dietary fiber, and studied the flavor and stability of final product.
